channel.title: LLM Timeline — Adept Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Adept.

item.title: Fuyu-Heavy (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: 100B License: closed Type: model AI model by Adept

item.title: Fuyu-Heavy (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: Fuyu-Heavy License: partial Type: model Fuyu-Heavy is the world’s third-most-capable multimodal model, behind only GPT4-V and Gemini Ultra, which are 10-20 times bigger.' Token estimate is based on Adept Persimmon-8B using many more tokens.

item.title: Fuyu-8B (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by Adept

item.title: Fuyu (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: Fuyu License: open Type: model VLM. 8B available under open licence, Medium size is closed

item.title: Persimmon-8B (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: 9.3B License: open Type: model AI model by Adept

item.title: Persimmon-8B (Adept)
item.description: Parameters: Persimmon-8B License: open Type: model Open Apache license and publicly accessible weights.
